name: Pecan Stuffed Smoked Pheasant
recipeInstructions:
1. Melt the butter and pour over bread crumbs. Add pecan meats and toss lightly.
2. Stuff mixture into pheasants and truss birds.
3. Combine flour, salt, and pepper, and lightly sprinkle over pheasants.
4. Melt the remaining butter in a heavy frying pan. Brown each pheasant on all sides and transfer to a roasting pan.
5. Add hot water and sherry to the browned birds. Cover and bake at 350°F for 1 hour.
6. Baste with liquid every 15 minutes. Remove cover and continue baking for an additional 20 minutes, or until the birds are crisp and brown.
7. Remove birds to a platter and keep hot while thickening the dripping for gravy. Serves 6
